title: Skills gap: add governance/context proof-packager run mode
description: First action: extend `agents/client-proof-engine/AGENT.md` or create a proof-packager run mode that bundles proof, risk controls, context maps, evals, and ROI into one private artifact from accepted client work. Why it matters: Eve has AI Context OS, governance, and proof-capture pieces, but they need to ship as one sales/job proof package instead of scattered artifacts. Done: agent/run mode exists, is registered if new, and can produce a proof-safe private pack for Altmark or Aya without public overclaiming.
